query: What's the contractor vs employee labor mix by craft last quarter?
expected_behavior: Loads maximo-labor-resources with maximo-overview as parent
Joins LABTRANS to LABOR via (LABORCODE, ORGID)
Distinguishes contractor vs employee via LABOR.VENDOR IS NOT NULL (default convention). Workspace glossary may override with LABOR.LABORTYPE or LABOR.OUTSIDELABOR
Filters LABTRANS.TRANSTYPE = 'WORK' and a 3-month look-back window
Aggregates by CRAFT × labor_type (CONTRACTOR/EMPLOYEE) with SUM hours and cost
Does NOT confuse LABOR with PERSON — uses LEFT JOIN to PERSON so contractor labor with no PERSON link still appears
